title: Regional Controller
description:
Our client, a well-established MNC, is introducing a newly created regional finance leadership position to enhance its APAC controlling and performance management framework. The role will oversee regional corporate controlling, serve as a key finance interface with Regional Leadership and Global HQ, and lead cross-market improvement initiatives. The position involves approximately 15–20% travel and offers the opportunity to shape regional processes, team ways of working, and strategic initiatives.


Key Responsibilities:

Regional Corporate Controlling

  • Lead regional corporate controlling activities, including regional management reporting, regional consolidation, forecasting, budgeting, and steering processes
  • Serve as the primary finance liaison between APAC, Global HQ, and country finance teams
  • Ensure alignment, consistency, and quality of financial reporting across markets

Team Leadership & Guidance

  • Lead and guide a regional corporate controlling team
  • Provide leadership value-add, coaching, and direction to a team with strong institutional knowledge
  • Establish clear structures, priorities, and governance across the regional function

Regional Projects & Business Support

  • Provide finance leadership support to regional functions, particularly Supply Chain
  • Lead cross-country improvement initiatives and operative projects
  • Drive projects from assessment through implementation; transition ownership back to country teams once improvements are embedded

Qualifications

  • Background in large MNCs, ideally in regional or global roles
  • Strong experience in corporate controlling, regional finance, or FP&A
  • Proven experience leading medium-sized, multi-location teams
  • Project-driven mindset with the ability to manage ambiguity
  • Strong cultural awareness and experience working across APAC markets


Please email your cv directly in word format to sindhu@theedgepartnership.com .


Please note that due to the high number of applications only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. We regret to inform you that your application for this position was unsuccessful if you do not hear from us in the next 5 business days. 

EA License: 16S8131 
Recruiter License: R1981753

postedCompany.description:
We are The Edge

Whether it’s a start-up, a local conglomerate, an international bank or an MNC, our goal is single-minded – to provide clients with the competitive edge needed to source key talents across all aspects of their business. Combined, our partners have over 30 years of experience in sourcing global talent for businesses in Asia.

We partner with those companies and individuals that understand and treasure the value of working closely with their recruitment partners, creating a relationship based upon trust, mutual respect and professionalism.

We offer the leading edge in…

  • developing opportunities for candidates and clients alike across the competitive Asian employment landscape.
  • delivering career opportunities, career management, responsiveness and service levels.
  • creating innovative, imaginative and sometimes unconventional solutions to support our clients’ requirements.
  • providing an internationally-linked market leading database and world class IT support.

We specialize in

  • Banking & Financial Services
  • Commerce & Industry
  • Sales & Marketing
  • Human Resources
  • Information Technology
  • Supply Chain Management

http://theedgeinasia.com/
